'''Team Tauntaun''' was one of the five Jedi strike-teams sent to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] as part of [[Operation Roundabout]]. Consisting of [[Tahiri Veila]], [[Doran Sarkin-Tainer]], and [[Tiu Zax]], their mission was to detain [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]].

The Corellians had anticipated the strike, however, and the ambush found itself ambushed instead. Although Tiu opted to remain inside Thrackan's residence as an infiltration asset, Tahiri and Doran joined [[Team Purella]] to improvise an escape-plan from Corellia.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
